summary: Strip single-quoted string literals before the sqlMutationRE keyword check so legitimate read-only queries that mention mutation keywords inside LIKE patterns are not falsely rejected.
reason: Greptile P2 review finding on PR #676: queries like `SELECT body FROM grants_messages WHERE body LIKE '%insert%'` were rejected by the defence-in-depth regex even though OpenReadOnly's mode=ro is the real write barrier and the query is harmless. The strip handles SQL-standard '' escaping for embedded quotes.
